final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire [7:0] pixel_in,
    output reg [3:0] pixel_out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            pixel_out <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            if (pixel_in >= 8'd128) begin
                pixel_out <= pixel_in[7:4]; // Upper 4 bits
            end else begin
                pixel_out <= pixel_in[3:0]; // Lower 4 bits
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
